author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Revised approach: extract the cleanly self-contained chunks (python/cpitd, signing, merge/gitignore) into submodules. The walkthrough and InitUI stay in mod.rs since they're tightly coupled to the run function and to each other via TuiChoices. This reduces mod.rs by ~500 LOC to ~2350 while keeping the module boundaries clean.
